TC_Title: Verify Manager Panel opens on /manager route
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager role user logged in.
Test steps: 1. Login with Manager role 2. Navigate to Manager Panel or /manager
Expected result: 1. Login successful 2. Manager Panel loads 3. Manager Profile Card displayed 4. Tabs Leave WFH Claims Resignation Performance Probation visible

TC_Title: Verify Manager Profile Card displays Name Email Phone Designation Address Scope
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager user logged in.
Test steps: 1. Navigate to Manager Panel 2. Observe profile card
Expected result: 1. Login successful 2. Profile card loads 3. Name Email Phone Designation Current address 4. Data visible for (emp_type · circle)

TC_Title: Verify Manager Profile Card shows loading skeleton
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager user logged in.
Test steps: 1. Navigate to Manager Panel 2. Observe during load
Expected result: 1. Login successful 2. Panel opens 3. Skeleton loading state shown 4. Then profile content displays

TC_Title: Verify Manager Profile Card shows photo or avatar
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager user with or without photo.
Test steps: 1. Navigate to Manager Panel 2. Observe profile photo
Expected result: 1. Login successful 2. Profile card displayed 3. Photo or default avatar shown

TC_Title: Verify all six tabs display with badge counts
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager user logged in.
Test steps: 1. Navigate to Manager Panel 2. Verify each tab
Expected result: 1. Login successful 2. Panel loaded 3. Leave WFH Claims Resignation Performance Probation tabs 4. Each shows badge count

TC_Title: Verify tab with pending count shows has-pending badge styling
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager user logged in. 3. At least one pending request exists.
Test steps: 1. Navigate to Manager Panel 2. Observe tab with pending count
Expected result: 1. Login successful 2. Tab with pending count 3. Badge has has-pending styling

TC_Title: Verify clicking tab switches content
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager user logged in.
Test steps: 1. Navigate to Manager Panel 2. Click Leave 3. Click Claims 4. Click Performance
Expected result: 1. Login successful 2. Leave tab active and content shown 3. Claims tab active and content shown 4. Performance tab active and content shown

TC_Title: Verify default tab auto-selects first with pending count
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager user logged in. 3. Pending leave requests exist.
Test steps: 1. Login as manager 2. Navigate to Manager Panel 3. Wait for counts to load
Expected result: 1. Login successful 2. Counts loaded 3. Leave tab auto-selected (first with pending) 4. Leave content displayed

TC_Title: Verify status filters All Pending Approved Rejected show for approval tabs
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager user logged in. 3. Leave tab active.
Test steps: 1. Navigate to Manager Panel 2. Click Leave tab 3. Observe status filters
Expected result: 1. Login successful 2. Leave tab active 3. Status filters All Pending Approved Rejected visible 4. All selected by default

TC_Title: Verify status filters hidden for Performance and Probation tabs
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager user logged in.
Test steps: 1. Navigate to Manager Panel 2. Click Performance 3. Click Probation
Expected result: 1. Login successful 2. Performance tab active 3. Status filters not shown 4. Same for Probation

TC_Title: Verify status filter Pending shows only pending requests
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager user logged in. 3. Mix of pending and approved leave.
Test steps: 1. Click Leave tab 2. Click Pending filter 3. Observe list
Expected result: 1. Login successful 2. Pending filter selected 3. Only Pending leave requests shown

TC_Title: Verify status filter Approved shows only approved requests
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager user logged in. 3. Approved leave exists.
Test steps: 1. Click Leave tab 2. Click Approved filter 3. Observe list
Expected result: 1. Login successful 2. Approved filter selected 3. Only Approved requests shown

TC_Title: Verify status filter Rejected shows only rejected requests
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager user logged in. 3. Rejected leave exists.
Test steps: 1. Click Leave tab 2. Click Rejected filter 3. Observe list
Expected result: 1. Login successful 2. Rejected filter selected 3. Only Rejected requests shown

TC_Title: Verify Leave tab shows request cards with employee name reason status
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager user logged in. 3. Leave requests exist.
Test steps: 1. Click Leave tab 2. Observe request cards
Expected result: 1. Login successful 2. Leave content loaded 3. Cards show employee name leave type dates 4. Status pill Approve Reject for pending

TC_Title: Verify Leave Approve action updates request and refreshes count
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager user logged in. 3. Pending leave request exists.
Test steps: 1. Click Leave tab 2. Click Approve on a request 3. Observe
Expected result: 1. Login successful 2. Approve clicked 3. Button shows Updating... 4. Request removed from Pending; count decrements

TC_Title: Verify Leave Reject action updates request and refreshes count
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager user logged in. 3. Pending leave request exists.
Test steps: 1. Click Leave tab 2. Click Reject on a request 3. Observe
Expected result: 1. Login successful 2. Reject clicked 3. Button shows Updating... 4. Request removed from Pending; count decrements

TC_Title: Verify Leave empty state when no requests
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager user logged in. 3. No leave requests.
Test steps: 1. Click Leave tab 2. Observe
Expected result: 1. Login successful 2. Leave content loaded 3. Message: No leave requests found

TC_Title: Verify Leave loading state during fetch
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager user logged in.
Test steps: 1. Click Leave tab 2. Observe during load
Expected result: 1. Login successful 2. Leave tab active 3. Loading leave requests... shown 4. Then content or empty

TC_Title: Verify WFH tab shows request cards with Approve Reject
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager user logged in. 3. WFH requests exist.
Test steps: 1. Click Work From Home tab 2. Observe request cards
Expected result: 1. Login successful 2. WFH content loaded 3. Cards with employee name reason 4. Approve Reject for pending

TC_Title: Verify WFH status filter works
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager user logged in. 3. WFH requests exist.
Test steps: 1. Click WFH tab 2. Select Pending filter 3. Observe
Expected result: 1. Login successful 2. Pending selected 3. Only Pending WFH requests shown

TC_Title: Verify WFH Approve updates request
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager user logged in. 3. Pending WFH exists.
Test steps: 1. Click WFH tab 2. Click Approve on request 3. Observe
Expected result: 1. Login successful 2. Approve clicked 3. Request processed 4. Count updates

TC_Title: Verify Claims tab shows request cards with Project and country
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager user logged in. 3. Claim requests exist.
Test steps: 1. Click Claims tab 2. Observe request cards
Expected result: 1. Login successful 2. Claims content loaded 3. Cards show Project - country_state 4. Approve Reject for pending

TC_Title: Verify Claims Approve Reject work
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager user logged in. 3. Pending claim exists.
Test steps: 1. Click Claims tab 2. Approve one request 3. Reject another
Expected result: 1. Login successful 2. Approve and Reject actions 3. Requests updated 4. Count refreshes

TC_Title: Verify Resignation tab shows request cards
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager user logged in. 3. Resignation requests exist.
Test steps: 1. Click Resignation tab 2. Observe request cards
Expected result: 1. Login successful 2. Resignation content loaded 3. Cards with employee name reason 4. Approve Reject for pending

TC_Title: Verify Resignation Approve Reject work
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager user logged in. 3. Pending resignation exists.
Test steps: 1. Click Resignation tab 2. Approve or Reject request 3. Observe
Expected result: 1. Login successful 2. Action clicked 3. Request processed 4. List and count update

TC_Title: Verify Performance tab displays month status filters and queue
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager user logged in.
Test steps: 1. Click Performance tab 2. Observe layout
Expected result: 1. Login successful 2. Performance content loaded 3. Month picker Status filter 4. Queue of employees needing review

TC_Title: Verify Performance Apply Filters loads queue
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager user logged in.
Test steps: 1. Click Performance tab 2. Select month and status 3. Click Apply Filters
Expected result: 1. Login successful 2. Filters applied 3. Queue reloads 4. Items displayed

TC_Title: Verify Performance open review shows rating and comments form
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager user logged in. 3. Pending review exists.
Test steps: 1. Click Performance tab 2. Click to open review for an employee 3. Observe form
Expected result: 1. Login successful 2. Review opened 3. Rating dropdown Excellent Good Average Needs Improvement 4. Comments field

TC_Title: Verify Performance submit review saves successfully
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager user logged in. 3. Review form open.
Test steps: 1. Open review 2. Select rating and enter comments 3. Submit 4. Observe
Expected result: 1. Login successful 2. Rating and comments filled 3. Submit clicked 4. Success: Review saved successfully; modal closes; queue refreshes

TC_Title: Verify Performance empty state when no reviews
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager user logged in. 3. No pending reviews.
Test steps: 1. Click Performance tab 2. Apply filters 3. Observe
Expected result: 1. Login successful 2. Queue loaded 3. Empty state or no items message

TC_Title: Verify Probation tab displays Probation Reviews Due 6-month
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager user logged in.
Test steps: 1. Click Probation tab 2. Observe
Expected result: 1. Login successful 2. Probation content loaded 3. Title: Probation Reviews Due (6-month) 4. Description about submitting feedback

TC_Title: Verify Probation shows employee cards with name email DOJ probation end
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager user logged in. 3. Probation reviews due exist.
Test steps: 1. Click Probation tab 2. Observe employee cards
Expected result: 1. Login successful 2. List loaded 3. Each card: employee name email DOJ Probation end date 4. Rating and feedback form

TC_Title: Verify Probation submit review with rating and feedback
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager user logged in. 3. Probation review due.
Test steps: 1. Click Probation tab 2. Open form for employee 3. Select rating enter feedback 4. Submit
Expected result: 1. Login successful 2. Rating and feedback filled 3. Submit clicked 4. Success: Review submitted. HR has been notified.; list refreshes

TC_Title: Verify Probation empty state when no reviews pending
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager user logged in. 3. No probation reviews due.
Test steps: 1. Click Probation tab 2. Observe
Expected result: 1. Login successful 2. Probation loaded 3. Message: No probation reviews pending

TC_Title: Verify Probation loading state
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager user logged in.
Test steps: 1. Click Probation tab 2. Observe during load
Expected result: 1. Login successful 2. Probation tab active 3. Loading probation reviews... 4. Then content

TC_Title: Verify Request Card shows Processed for approved or rejected
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager user logged in. 3. Approved or Rejected request in list.
Test steps: 1. Select tab with Approved filter 2. Observe card
Expected result: 1. Login successful 2. Approved or Rejected card displayed 3. Processed pill shown 4. No Approve Reject buttons

TC_Title: Verify tab switch resets status filter to All
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager user logged in.
Test steps: 1. Click Leave 2. Select Pending 3. Click Claims tab 4. Return to Leave
Expected result: 1. Login successful 2. Pending selected on Leave 3. Claims tab clicked 4. Status filter resets to All when switching

TC_Title: Verify Performance count refreshes periodically
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager user logged in.
Test steps: 1. Open Manager Panel 2. Note Performance badge count 3. Wait 30 seconds 4. Observe
Expected result: 1. Login successful 2. Initial count displayed 3. Count may refresh after interval 4. Badge updates if count changed

TC_Title: Verify error message when Leave API fails
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager user logged in. 3. API failure simulated.
Test steps: 1. Simulate Leave API failure 2. Click Leave tab
Expected result: 1. Failure simulated 2. Leave tab active 3. Error message displayed

TC_Title: Verify error message when approval action fails
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager user logged in. 3. Pending leave exists. 4. Approve API fails.
Test steps: 1. Click Leave 2. Click Approve 3. Simulate API failure
Expected result: 1. Login successful 2. Approve clicked 3. Error message: Unable to update leave request 4. Request remains in list

TC_Title: Verify unauthenticated user redirected from Manager Panel
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. User not logged in.
Test steps: 1. Clear token or logout 2. Try to access /manager
Expected result: 1. No token 2. /manager accessed 3. Redirect to login 4. Manager Panel not accessible

TC_Title: Verify Manager Panel responsive on mobile viewport
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager user logged in.
Test steps: 1. Navigate to Manager Panel 2. Resize to mobile width
Expected result: 1. Login successful 2. Manager Panel displayed 3. Layout reflows 4. Tabs and content usable

TC_Title: Verify location state updatedId newStatus triggers update signal
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager user logged in. 3. Navigate with state from external page.
Test steps: 1. Navigate to /manager with state updatedId newStatus 2. Observe
Expected result: 1. Login successful 2. Manager Panel loads 3. updateSignal applied 4. Affected request may highlight or refresh

TC_Title: Verify aria-selected and aria-label on tabs for accessibility
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Manager user logged in.
Test steps: 1. Navigate to Manager Panel 2. Inspect tab buttons
Expected result: 1. Login successful 2. Tabs have role tab 3. Active tab has aria-selected true 4. Badge has aria-label with pending count
